/usr/bin/clang++ -g -O0 -arch arm64 -isysroot /Applications/Xcode.app/Contents/Developer/Platforms/MacOSX.platform/Developer/SDKs/MacOSX15.1.sdk -Wl,-search_paths_first -Wl,-headerpad_max_install_names CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/Camera.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/Cloth.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/Color.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/Image.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/Light.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/Material.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/Particle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/Plane.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/Point.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/Ray.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/Scene.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/Shape.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/SpringDamper.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/Triangle.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/Unit.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/Vector.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/OpenGLProject.dir/utils.cpp.o -o /Users/panhng/Desktop/ids90/ClothSimulator/OpenGLProject   -L/opt/homebrew/lib  -Wl,-rpath,/opt/homebrew/lib -lglfw -lglew -framework GLUT -framework OpenGL
